author: doll-agent
content:
Done. None of the polynomial types implemented std::ops, so users had to write p.add(&q).unwrap() instead of p + q. Added Add, Sub, Mul, Neg for all six bases (Polynomial, Chebyshev, Legendre, Hermite, HermiteE, Laguerre).

Design: operator forms panic on domain/window mismatch (matches ndarray's shape-mismatch convention). The fallible Poly::{add,sub,mul} methods stay for code that needs to recover.

Implementation in new src/ops.rs via impl_poly_ops! macro keyed on (struct name, module name). 8 impls per type (owned and ref forms x Add/Sub/Mul/Neg) gives 48 impls total without duplication. Bumped with_same_mapping to pub(crate) in all 6 polynomial files so the macro can construct mapping-preserving results.

11 tests covering Add/Sub/Mul/Neg owned and ref forms across all 6 bases plus the panic-on-mismatch path.

ferray-polynomial: 135 -> 146 tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit ada6e4c7.
